name: l2_powered_hover_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverWakeFootprint derives hover slipstream contraction mass-flow downwash and local wake-probe targets.
note: Primary audit surface for hover downwash footprint targets.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover thrust pressure jump induced velocity far-wake velocity and source-term rows.
note: Powered hover source-map input.

name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies the actuator-disk momentum-theory velocity and power closure basis.
note: Momentum-theory reference used by this footprint.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan supplies static L2 grid cell size and request envelope dimensions for future wake probes.
note: Grid envelope input for radius-in-cell metrics.

name: l2_powered_source_coupling_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceCouplingReadinessGate keeps runtime coupling closed while live powered-source evidence is missing.
note: Runtime coupling guardrail for the footprint packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future powered hover local wake-probe validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for future local wake validation.
